shayari: Shayari ka lya Z💞S,Z💞S²,Z💞S³ command try kro
Z💞S: Alfaaz ki shakal mein ehsaas likha jata hai Yahan paani ko bhi pyaas likha jata hai Mere jazbaat se waqif hai meri kalam Main pyaar likhun toh tera naam likha jata hai
Z💞S²: Mohabbat unse nahi hoti jo khoobsurat hote hain Khoobsurat wo hote hain jinse mohabbat ho jati hai
Z💞S³: Khuda kare ke hamari dosti itni gehri ho,Waqt tera ho aur maut meri ho.
Z💞S⁴: Unki nazar ko fursat na mili hogi, warna mera marz itna la-ilaaj na tha.
Z💞S⁵: Log kehte hain ki maut aayegi toh sab le jayegi, magar unhe kya pata ki aap jaisa yaar naseeb walon ko milta hai.
Z💞S⁶: Tere khayal se hi ek raunak aa jati hai chehre par,Log puchte hain humse ki itna kyu muskurate ho.
Z💞S⁷: Zaroori nahi ki har rishte ka koi naam ho,Kuch rishte bina naam ke bhi bohat khoobsurat hote hain.
Z💞S⁸: Humne dekha hai zamane ko aate jaate,Bas ek tujhe dekhne ki hasrat nahi gayi.
Z💞S⁹: Log kehte hain ki kismat khuda likhta hai,Kaash khuda ne meri kismat mein tujhe likha hota.
